---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something new for P3, or an improvement to something that already exists
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["feature"]
---

> ⚠️ **Before you submit:** Please do not include personal data or credentials in this issue. This is a public repository — anyone can see what you post here.

## What would you like to see?

A clear description of the feature or improvement you're suggesting.

## What problem would this solve for you?

Help us understand the real situation this would help with — this is often more useful than the specific solution you have in mind.

## Have you considered any alternatives?

If you've found a workaround, or considered other ways to solve this, let us know.

## Anything else?

Any other context, mockups, or examples from other tools that illustrate what you mean.
